results.title: Senior Data & AI Architect (f/m/x) - IBM iX
highlights:
Senior Data & AI Architect (f/m/x) - IBM iX
...
# Senior Data & AI Architect (f/m/x)
...
### IBM iX – Designing
...
You don’t design architecture. You decide whether AI works.
...
Locations: Berlin, Düsseldorf | Work model: full-time (40h per week), hybrid
...
We develop AI and data solutions with tangible value for our clients. You design scalable architectures, translate complex requirements into implementable systems and guide projects from idea to production.Your contribution: turning concepts into systems that perform in the real world.
...
### Your tasks
...
- Own end-to-end architecture for data and AI platforms (scalable, secure, compliant)
- Design modern data architectures (e.g. Data Lakehouse, Data Mesh, Data Vault) and AI/ML pipelines
- Define standards for Responsible AI, governance and security
- Provide technical leadership in projects, internally and with clients
- Select and implement tools, platforms and hyperscalers (AWS, Azure, GCP)
- Optimise, monitor and move AI models into stable production environments
- Collaborate with engineering, security, sales and delivery on equal footing
...
### What you bring
...
- Deep expertise in data and AI architectures (cloud-native, distributed)
- Strong understanding of MLOps, operationalisation and lifecycle management
- Experience with frameworks such as MLflow, Azure ML or SageMaker, including CI/CD for ML
- Knowledge of Responsible AI, security and regulatory requirements (e.g. GDPR, AI Act)
- Ability to make complex systems easy to understand and actionable
- Experience in cross-functional, agile teams
- Very good German (C1) and English (at least B2)
...
Details on this job
...

highlights:
# AI Development Manager
...
AI Development Manager
...
collaborating with cross
...
IBM’s AI Center of Excellence (CoE), stands at the forefront of innovation, leveraging the latest advancements in Generative AI to drive internal transformation.• Join us in the pursuit of not just solving business challenges across IBM Infrastructure, but reshaping the landscape for our employees through creative AI solutions. Immersing ourselves in the technology we deliver to our clients, we’re not just adapting to change; we’re driving it.• Join us in redefining how AI enhances productivity, improves workflows, and delivers value across IBM Infrastructure.
...
The AI Center of Excellence is seeking a skilled Development Manager to join our team. In this role, you will lead a team of engineers to develop and implement advanced AI solutions using IBM’s Watsonx platform and pretrained models like Granite. You will build scalable and secure applications on IBM Cloud, collaborating with Technical Account Managers, Solution Architects, UX/UI Designers, Developers, and other stakeholders to deliver impactful, innovative solutions.
...
• Develop high performing technical talent with a particular focus on delivering value.• Oversee the end-to-end development lifecycle of AI solutions, ensuring timely and high-quality delivery.• Design and establish architectural frameworks for AI and cloud-based solutions.• Review and approve technical designs and implementations, identifying and mitigating risk.• Ensure high standards of code quality through regular code reviews, automated testing, and adherence to coding standards.• Identify and implement improvements in development processes, tools, and methodologies to increase team efficiency and product quality.• Evaluate and recommend new technologies and frameworks for implementation.
...
• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Business, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field• 7+ years of software development, with at least 2 years in developing and deploying AI/ML solutions, particularly generative AI models• 2+ years of leading a team of engineers• Expertise in languages such as Python and Java or JavaScript relevant to AI development.• Strong experience with AI/ML frameworks and APIs like PyTorch, Hugging Face, LangChain, OpenAI API and their use in developing generative AI applications• Experience in deploying and fine-tuning models like Granite, Mistral, and Llama 3• Experience with LLM prompt engineering, retrieval augmented generation• Experience with CI/CD pipelines, version control systems (e.g., Git), and containerization tools (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes)• Experience with both SQL and NoSQL databases relevant to AI applications• Solid understanding of cloud security best practices, data encryption, and compliance standards• Passionate about how AI can change software development and motivated to turn this into a reality• Proven ability to lead and mentor technical teams, fostering a collaborative and innovative environment• Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to convey complex technical concepts to diverse audiences• High level of accuracy and attention to detail in all aspects of development and documentation
...
• Hands on experience with the Watsonx product portfolio• Proficiency with IBM Cloud services, including compute, storage, networking, and AI-specific offerings• Track record of implementing large-scale AI solutions• Experience with performance optimization and scalability design• Background in designing event-driven architectures• Proficient in agile software development practices, with experience leading agile teams
...
At IBM, we pride ourselves on being an early adopter of artificial intelligence, quantum computing and blockchain. Now it’s time for you to join us on our journey to being a responsible technology innovator and a force for good in the world.

results.title: IBM AI-Driven Threat Detection Engineer | Hirevector
highlights:
IBM AI-Driven Threat Detection Engineer | Hirevector
...
# IBM AI-Driven Threat Detection Engineer
...
Posted Jun 17, 2026
...
Role Overview The AI Engineer will be a key contributor to the client's digital transformation initiatives. This role focuses on designing, developing, and deploying scalable, ethical AI solutions to improve operational efficiency, automate decision-making, and support strategic initiatives for environmental and social programs. Experience Minimum 3+ years of hands-on experience in AI/ML model development and deployment. Strong experience with LLMs, RAG, NLP, and Generative AI solutions. Experience with MLOps, Docker, and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform). Key Responsibilities AI Solution Development Design, develop, train, validate, and optimize AI/ML models. Implement Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), NLP models, and GenAI solutions. Translate business requirements into technical specifications. AI Solution Implementation & Operations Deploy AI models into production environments. Perform ongoing model training, monitoring, troubleshooting, and fine-tuning. Manage MLOps pipelines using tools such as MLflow and Docker. Ensure compliance with ethical AI standards and data governance policies. Data Analysis & Research Collect, preprocess, and engineer large structured and unstructured datasets (including geospatial data). Recommend and implement data cleaning and preparation strategies. Monitor data quality, detect bias, and manage model/data drift. Research emerging AI technologies and recommend enhancements. User Enablement & Documentation Conduct training sessions for stakeholders. Develop technical documentation and user guides to support adoption. Governance, Strategy & Support Advise World Bank Group staff on AI strategy and policy implications. Contribute to AI roadmap, innovation agenda, and long-term enhancements. Provide continuous support and maintenance for existing AI solutions. Required Qualifications Education Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, or a related field. Technical Skills Proficiency in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and NLP frameworks. Experience with Azure AI, Google Vertex AI/Search, and Vector Databases. Strong knowledge of deep learning, computer vision, and large language models. Experience with REST APIs, NoSQL, and RDBMS. API Management experience for integrating multiple data sources. Preferred Certifications Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Engineer Associate Google Machine Learning Engineer SAFe Agile Software Engineer (ASE) Certification in AI Ethics Deliverables / Milestones Develop Proof of Concepts (POCs) to assess feasibility of AI use cases Develop, train, and deploy AI models aligned to business objectives. For applications and inquiries, contact: hirings@openkyber.com Apply tot his job

results.title: Data Engineer | Leading Talent
highlights:
At IBM Quantum Software, we are looking for an experienced Data Engineer to help build the foundation of our data lake that powers data insights on our Quantum Computing platform. The candidate must demonstrate experience in designing and implementing data pipelines, data orchestration platforms, and data catalogs for data warehouses and data lakes. The candidate is familiar with the principals of data governance, scalable computing, and data quality monitoring, and has experience building data pipelines connecting to multiple services in a complex organization and adhering to best practices for data privacy and security. This role requires strong communication skills to be able to work with data owners and consumers of the data, such as business and technical teams. The candidate should have organizational skills in defining processes and methods to curate and present data in an easily consumable fashion to facilitate a self-serve data access pattern in a governed and secure manner.To be successful as a data engineer, you should have a working knowledge of modern data lake and lake house concepts, and be well versed in data orchestration tools to support extraction, loading, and transformation of data.
...
* 5+ years of experience building data pipelines on large scale data warehouses or data lake solutions * Strong experience with data orchestration tools like Apache Airflow, Prefect, Dagster, or DBT * Strong command of relational databases (Postgresql preferred), data modeling and database design * Experience delivering complex data pipelines end-to-end, including collaboration with stakeholders to understand the nature of data sources, building scalable processes to persist data in a data lake, and ensuring continued success of pipelines through monitoring and observability * Experience with data security, access control, and data governance * Ability to document processes and data, and familiarity with modern data catalog solutions * Strong command of Python and Python scripting; experience using Python for Data Pipelines * Familiarity with modern data warehouse and data lakes, including technologies like Presto, Trino, Spark, Iceberg, and/or Hive * Strong communications skills to interact with technical and business teams to prepare data assets
...
- Post a Job
- Experience with data pipeline observability
- Experience with streaming technologies like Kafka
- Experience with ingesting data from APIs like Github and Airtable
- Infrastructure and CI/CD Pipeline experience with technologies like Kubernetes, Helm, ArgoCD, and terraform
- SQL/NoSQL experience with other databases like MongoDB, IBM DB2 or similar
- Experience with cloud object storage and formats such as Parquet and Avro
- Ability to Design and implement a complete lifecycle for data operations (DataOps)
...

RAG = retrieve context from proprietary data, augment the prompt before generation. Fine-tuning = adapt LLM behavior and output format to reduce repetitive prompt instructions. Used text-to-SQL as example: fine-tuned on Q-A pairs so the model defaults to PostgreSQL syntax without being told each time. Framed as complementary tools, not competing choices.
...
"I'm an AI/ML engineer with 13 years of experience, the last six focused on production LLM systems. At Accenture I led an enterprise agentic analytics platform — text-to-SQL, RAG, visualization, and narrative generation — which reduced analyst report turnaround from hours to minutes for multiple clients. Since April I've been at IBM expanding into multi-agent architectures. I'm looking for a role where I can take more ownership at the system-design level."
...
is a clear factual
...
— the most consequential one
...

...
head), after
...
. Confusing these
...
explicitly: fine-
...
behavior and style
...
. RAG is the correct
...
"Choose RAG when knowledge changes frequently — you can't retrain every time a policy or document updates; when factual accuracy is critical and you need traceable source citations; or when data sensitivity prevents sharing training data with an external fine-tuning API. Choose fine-tuning when you need consistent output format or domain behavior — like always producing valid PostgreSQL without prompt scaffolding — and your training data is stable and high quality. The key insight is that fine-tuning changes behavior, not knowledge — the model can still hallucinate facts it never saw. In production I'd often combine them: fine-tune for output discipline, RAG for dynamic factual grounding."
...
This is a hard gap with a known fix. Spend three focused hours with the "Attention Is All You Need" paper and Andrej Karpathy's "Let's build GPT from scratch" video. Know the scaled dot-product attention formula cold. Know exactly what the FFN does and why it is architecturally separate from the output head. These three components — attention sub-layer, FFN, language model head — are among the most consistently probed questions for any senior AI/ML role.
...

fine-tuning, bias vs. variance controls, bagging vs. boosting —

...
Return to your Accenture project and excavate real or conservative estimates for each capability you built: latency reduction, user adoption, error rate, time-to-insight gain, or cost savings. Find at least one metric per capability (text-to-SQL, RAG, visualization, narrative writing). Weave one number naturally into every project-related answer. Metrics are credibility anchors — they transform abstract experience into verifiable engineering.
